compiled_state.title: Create huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md contract + structural boundary tests for REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## TDD Requirement

Tests FAIL (RED) before Task 4 creates REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md. Tests apply Rule 5 (non-executable instruction file): structural boundary checks only — section headings, referential integrity, shim compliance.

NOTE: Sprint dispatches parallel tasks to separate worktrees; harvest-worktree.sh merges .test-index entries atomically. No shared-state race with Task 2841-926a.

## Files to Create

### plugins/dso/docs/contracts/huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md

Defines HUGE_DIFF_PATTERN_EXTRACTION signal:
- Emitter: haiku sub-agent dispatched per sampled file by REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md
- Parser: REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md consensus evaluation (Step 3)
- Output fields: transformation_description (string, required), before_pattern (string, required), after_pattern (string, required), confidence ("high"|"medium"|"low", required)
- Consensus rule: count files with identical transformation_description; ≥5 of 7 = CONFIRMED_REFACTOR; <5 = FALLBACK

### tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge.sh

6 structural boundary tests (all fail RED before Task 4):

test_huge_workflow_has_sampling_step:
  grep -q 'review-sample-files.sh' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md

test_huge_workflow_has_consensus_section:
  grep -qE '^## (Step 3|Consensus)' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md

test_huge_workflow_has_routing_section:
  grep -qE '^## (Step 4|Route)' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md

test_huge_workflow_has_record_review_shim_compliance:
  grep -q 'CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT.*record-review.sh\|record-review.sh.*CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md

test_huge_workflow_references_pattern_extraction_contract:
  grep -q 'huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md && test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md

test_huge_workflow_record_review_has_required_flags:
  grep -qE -- '--expected-hash|--reviewer-hash' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md

### .test-index

Append new entry (do NOT create duplicate line):
plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md: tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge.sh [test_huge_workflow_has_sampling_step] [test_huge_workflow_has_record_review_shim_compliance]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Contract file exists with required fields
  Verify: grep -q 'transformation_description' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md && echo PASS
- [ ] Test file has 6 functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_huge_workflow_' tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge.sh | grep -q '^6$' && echo PASS
- [ ] .test-index entry and RED markers
  Verify: grep 'test_huge_workflow_has_sampling_step' .test-index && echo PASS
- Pre-implementation gate (execution note, not a durable Verify): run bash tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge.sh BEFORE committing Task 4; expect exactly 5 FAIL (test_huge_workflow_references_pattern_extraction_contract passes GREEN because contract exists; other 5 fail RED because REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md does not yet exist)

comments.body: AC amendment: Add to huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md contract: (a) Consensus equivalence: transformation_description strings are compared after lowercasing and stripping leading/trailing whitespace. (b) Failure taxonomy for Step 2 in REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md: 'failure' = any of: agent timeout, non-zero exit, response is not valid JSON, missing required field (transformation_description), or confidence='low' (low-confidence responses do not count toward ≥5/7 consensus). (c) Add these definitions to the contract so the parser (workflow) and emitter (haiku agent prompt) use identical semantics.
comments.author: Test
